steps.title: Use the area scale rule
steps.content: The side lengths of square A are $248$ times the side lengths of square B. Areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor.

steps.title: Square the side scale
steps.content:
The area scale factor is
$$248^2=61{,}504$$
So the value of $k$ is $61{,}504$. The answer is A.
